overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a wizard character in a green robe walking through the medieval fantasy village of Hogsmeade. The character crosses a stone bridge, passes through a covered wooden entrance archway, and explores the cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed buildings and NPC villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone approach path to village entrance

events.description: villager in blue dress walks past on the left in opposite direction
character begins ascending the stone bridge toward the village gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the village entrance bridge

notable_agents.action: villager walking past the camera holder in the opposite direction

entered.detail: cobblestone bridge leading to the village entrance with stone walls on sides
low stone wall with grass and vegetation on top
low stone wall running parallel to the path
medieval timber-framed village buildings visible in the distance
black iron street lamps along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path bordered by stone walls and greenery, approaching a stone bridge that leads to a medieval village. A villager passes by in the opposite direction as the character begins to ascend the bridge toward the timber-framed buildings in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden entrance gate with arched timber beams

events.description: entering the covered wooden archway structure marking the village entrance
passing underneath the red 'Hogsmeade' banner sign hanging from the archway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered wooden entrance archway into the village proper

notable_agents.action: two villagers standing and conversing near the archway exit

entered.detail: large timber-framed covered entrance with heavy wooden beams and stone pillars
red banner with gold lettering reading 'Hogsmeade' suspended from the archway
black iron lanterns hanging from the wooden beams
thick stone support pillars at the base of the archway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered wooden archway with heavy timber beams and stone pillars, passing under a red 'Hogsmeade' banner. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural light filtering through beams and shadows, while villagers become visible ahead conversing near the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village street lined with timber-framed shops and stone buildings

events.description: exiting the covered archway into the open cobblestone street of the village
passing villagers sitting on wooden benches along the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the village street observing the medieval shops and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on wooden bench reading a book

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered buildings with white plaster and dark wooden beams
weathered stone structures with wooden doors and small windows
simple wooden benches placed along the shop fronts
circular metal shop signs suspended over the street
black iron lamp posts along the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway, the scene opens into a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed shops and stone buildings. The character passes by villagers sitting on wooden benches and walking along the street, with hanging shop signs and iron street lamps visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: central village square approaching crooked landmark building

events.description: distinctive crooked timber building with red banners comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the central square with the prominent crooked architecture

notable_agents.action: two women in period dresses standing and gesturing toward the buildings

entered.detail: distinctive leaning timber-framed structure with steeply pitched roof
vertical red and gold banners hanging from the crooked building
wider open area where multiple streets converge

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider central square area, with a distinctive crooked timber building with red banners dominating the view ahead. The character approaches this landmark structure while passing villagers in period clothing standing along the right side of the cobblestone street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet rural path into the bustling, timber-framed heart of a medieval fantasy village. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path bordered by stone walls and greenery, ascending a stone bridge as a villager passes by. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions through a covered wooden archway with heavy timber beams and a red Hogsmeade banner, shifting the lighting into a play of filtered sun and deep shadows. The view then opens into a narrow cobblestone street lined with shops, hanging signs, and iron lamps, passing villagers resting on wooden benches. Finally, the path expands into a wider central square, leading the character toward a prominent crooked timber building adorned with red banners.
